title: Contract labor reliance is elevated
detail: Contract labor ratio is above the peer 75th percentile or above 10%.

title: Liquidity appears thin
detail: Days cash on hand is below the peer 25th percentile or below 30 days.

title: Occupancy trails peers
detail: Latest occupancy is more than five percentage points below the peer median.

title: Occupancy has declined
detail: Occupancy is down more than five percentage points from roughly three years earlier.

title: Average daily census is small versus peers
detail: Average daily census is less than roughly 75% of the peer median, which can raise fixed cost per day.
